subcodes.first_line: O Jamshid! They say that Jam possessed a cup in his hand, world-revealing and jewel-adorned, and each morn in that goblet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمشید گویند که جم را جامی در دست بود جهان نما و مرصع هر صبح در آن قدح
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @love of God
